zh.Threlkeld, Cumberland, England: 英國英格蘭波藍德雷爾可爾德
zh.Threlkeld, Cumbria, England, United King: 英國英格蘭恩布利亞雷爾可爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Threlkeld於1304年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德雷爾可爾德時，他的父親Henry De Threlkeld22歲，母親Idonea of Greystoke20歲。他於1325年與Lady Katherine DeFritheby在英國英格蘭波藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1371年10月23日在法國皮卡迪索姆享年67歲。

zh-hans.Threlkeld, Cumbria, England, United King: 英国英格兰恩布利亞雷爾可爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Threlkeld于1304年出生在英国英格兰波藍德雷爾可爾德时，他的父亲Henry De Threlkeld22岁，母亲Idonea of Greystoke20岁。他于1325年与Lady Katherine DeFritheby在英国英格兰波藍德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1371年10月23日在法国皮卡迪索姆享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Threlkeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumbria): habitational name from Threlkeld in Cumbria, so named from Old Norse thrǽll ‘thrall, serf’ + kelda ‘spring, marshy place’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Threlkeld was born in 1304, in Threlkeld, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry De Threlkeld, was 22 and his mother, Idonea of Greystoke, was 20. He married Lady Katherine DeFritheby in 1325, in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 23 October 1371, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Threlkeld est né en 1304, à Threlkeld, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry De Threlkeld, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Idonea of Greystoke, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Katherine DeFritheby en 1325, à Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 23 octobre 1371, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Threlkeld 1304 in Threlkeld, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry De Threlkeld 22 und seine Mutter Idonea of Greystoke 20. Er hat 1325 in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Lady Katherine DeFritheby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 23. Oktober 1371 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Threlkeld è nato il nel 1304 nel Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry De Threlkeld, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Idonea of Greystoke, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Katherine DeFritheby nel 1325, nel Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 23 ottobre 1371, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Threlkeldが1304年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドスレルケルドで生まれた時，父Henry De Threlkeldは22歳，母Idonea of Greystokeは20歳であった。1325年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドでLady Katherine DeFrithebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1371年10月23日にフランスピカーディソンメで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Threlkeld(이)가 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 스렐켈드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry De Threlkeld(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Idonea of Greystoke(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드에서 Lady Katherine DeFritheby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1371년 10월 23일 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Threlkeld nasceu em 1304, em Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry De Threlkeld, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Idonea of Greystoke, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Katherine DeFritheby em 1325, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1371, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Threlkeld родился в 1304 г. в местности трелкелд, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry De Threlkeld было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Idonea of Greystoke, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Katherine DeFritheby в 1325 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 23 октября 1371 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Threlkeld nació en 1304, en Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry De Threlkeld, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Idonea of Greystoke, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Katherine DeFritheby en 1325, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1371, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 67 años.
